chemo.name: Cytarabine (Ara-C)
notes: Use steroid eye drops to prevent ocular toxicity
Monitor for neurotoxicity before each dose
Requires central line for high-dose administration

nursingNotes: Indication: AML in remission in patients younger than 60 years
Monitor neurological status twice daily — high-dose Ara-C risk
Watch for Cytarabine syndrome: fever, chest pain, rash, myalgia
Ensure hydration and TLS prophylaxis as needed
